topbar.title: Foundry Hosted Agent + Entra Agent ID Demo

app.heading: Foundry Hosted Agent + Entra Agent ID Demo
app.subtitle: A demo that visualizes how Microsoft Foundry's Hosted Agent accesses external APIs using both the Entra Agent ID Autonomous Agent flow (application permissions) and the Agent User OBO flow (delegated permissions), showing the contents of access tokens and "who's permissions were used" via the Identity Echo API.

autonomous.noCallerInfo: Failed to retrieve the Identity Echo API response. Please check Token Chain Flow Step 3.
autonomous.noResourceApi: The agent response did not contain a Resource API response. Please check your query.
autonomous.placeholder: The Resource API response will be displayed here when the agent executes the Autonomous Agent Flow.
autonomous.noTokenChain: The agent response did not contain Token Chain data. Please check your query.
autonomous.tokenChainPlaceholder: Token Chain results will be displayed here when the agent executes the Autonomous Agent Flow.

obo.noCallerInfo: Failed to retrieve the Identity Echo API response. Please check Token Chain Flow Step 3.
obo.noResourceApi: The agent response did not contain a Resource API response.
obo.placeholder: The Resource API response will be displayed here when the Interactive OBO Flow is executed.
obo.noTokenChain: The agent response did not contain Token Chain data.
obo.tokenChainPlaceholder: Token Chain results will be displayed here when the Interactive OBO Flow is executed.

noAgent.signInRequired: Please sign in to call the Identity Echo API.
noAgent.placeholder: Press the "Call Identity Echo API" button to display the Resource API response here.

chat.autoDescription: LLM automatically selects tool based on message content

autonomousPanel.heading: Autonomous Agent Flow
autonomousPanel.description: Backend API (MSI) → Foundry Hosted Agent (Agent Identity) → Identity Echo API
autonomousPanel.emptyState: Send a message to execute the Autonomous Agent Flow.

tools.autonomousAppDesc: Call Identity Echo API with Entra Agent Identity (App)
tools.autonomousUserDesc: Call Identity Echo API with Entra Agent Identity (User)
tools.checkEnvDesc: Check the agent runtime environment and Azure credentials

oboPanel.heading: Interactive Agent (OBO) Flow
oboPanel.descriptionShort: SPA (MSAL login) → Foundry Hosted Agent (OBO exchange) → Identity Echo API
oboPanel.descriptionFull: SPA (MSAL login) → Foundry Hosted Agent (Agent Identity On-behalf-of) → Identity Echo API
oboPanel.signInRequired: Please sign in to execute the Interactive Agent (OBO) flow.
oboPanel.emptyState:
Send a message to execute the Interactive Agent (OBO) Flow.
The agent will call the Identity Echo API with the logged-in user's delegated permissions.

tools.interactiveOboDesc: Call Identity Echo API with Interactive OBO flow (delegated human user)

callerInfo.noCallerInfo: The response does not contain caller information.
callerInfo.heading: Resource API Response

step1_get_t1.label: Acquire T1
step1_get_t1.description: Project MSI → Agent Blueprint Identity Token (T1)

step2_exchange_app_token.label: Acquire TR (App)
step2_exchange_app_token.description: T1 → Agent Identity Token (TR) via client_credentials for resource API access

step3_call_resource_api.label: API Call
step3_call_resource_api.description: Access Identity Echo API with Bearer TR

step2_exchange_user_t2.label: Acquire T2
step2_exchange_user_t2.description: T1 → Agent Identity Token (T2) via client_credentials

step3_exchange_user_token.label: Acquire TR (User)
step3_exchange_user_token.description: T2 + Agent User UPN → Delegated Token (TR) via user_fic grant

step4_call_resource_api.label: API Call
step4_call_resource_api.description: Access Identity Echo API with Bearer TR (delegated)
